   104→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   105→   Font utility classes — match .pen fontFamily values exactly
   106→   Use className="font-brand" / "font-body" / "font-mono" etc.
   107→   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   108→.font-brand   { font-family: var(--font-fraunces), 'Fraunces', serif; }

   115→   Base resets & global rules

   117→*, *::before, *::after {

   120→
   121→html, body {

   138→.skip-link {

   141→  left: 50%;
   142→  transform: translateX(-50%);
   143→  background: var(--hf-accent);

   154→  top: 8px;
   155→}
   156→

   160→    transition-duration: 0ms !important;

```text
     1→# HarmonyForge Design System Specification
     2→
     3→## 1. Color System
     4→
     5→The color palette utilizes fixed brand inputs structured explicitly into Light Mode (Sonata) and Dark Mode (Nocturne). Semantic meaning is strictly bound to color roles.
     6→
     7→### Light Mode — Sonata
     8→
     9→| Role | Color Name | Hex Code | Usage | Theme Token |
    10→| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    11→| **Background** | Antique White | `#FDF5E6` | Primary app background. | `theme.sonata.bg` |
    12→| **Surface** | Cherry Wood | `#9E4B3E` | Component backgrounds (cards, overlays, panels). | `theme.sonata.surface` |
    13→| **Detail** | Tan Birch | `#D2B48C` | Borders, secondary text, inactive states, staff lines. | `theme.sonata.detail` |
    14→| **Accent** | Amber Glow | `#FFB300` | Focus states, active selection, interactive handles. | `theme.sonata.accent` |
    15→
    16→### Dark Mode — Nocturne
    17→
    18→| Role | Color Name | Hex Code | Usage | Theme Token |
    19→| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    20→| **Background** | Dark Walnut | `#3E2723` | Primary app background. | `theme.nocturne.bg` |
    21→| **Surface** | Cognac | `#A55B37` | Component backgrounds (cards, overlays, panels). | `theme.nocturne.surface` |
    22→| **Detail** | Deep Cocoa | `#2D1817` | Borders, secondary text, inactive states, staff lines. | `theme.nocturne.detail` |
    23→| **Accent** | Amber Glow | `#FFB300` | Focus states, active selection, interactive handles. | `theme.nocturne.accent` |
    24→
    25→### Semantic Color Mappings (Cross-Theme)
    26→
    27→| State | Indicator Color | Token Example | Description |
    28→| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    29→| **Theory Violation** | `#D32F2F` (Red) | `semantic.violation.base` | Absolute error (e.g., parallel fifths). |
    30→| **Stylistic Warning** | `#1976D2` (Blue) | `semantic.warning.base` | Atypical but valid choices. |
    31→| **User Override** | `#7B1FA2` (Purple) | `semantic.override.base` | Applied to a explicitly bypassed warning. |
    32→| **Valid Deviation** | Theme Detail | `semantic.valid.base` | Adheres to logic without warnings uses standard Detail color. |
    33→
    34→### Color Combinations (WCAG & Semantic Constraints)
    35→
    36→| Background | Foreground Text/Element | Status |
    37→| :--- | :--- | :--- |
    38→| **Theme Surface** | Theme Detail | ✅ **Valid** (High contrast) |
    39→| **Theme BG** | Theme Detail | ✅ **Valid** (Border elements) |
    40→| **Theme BG** | Semantic Red | ❌ **Forbidden** (Red must sit on a Surface) |
    41→| **Semantic Red** | Theme Detail (Text) | ❌ **Forbidden** (Error text uses `#FFFFFF` only) |
    42→| **Warning Blue** | Semantic Red | ❌ **Forbidden** (Warnings and errors never touch) |
    43→
    44→---
    45→
    46→## 2. Typography System
    47→
    48→**Typefaces**
    49→
    50→* **Header (Brand):** Instrument Serif
    51→* **Body (Content):** Inter
    52→* **Labels (UI):** Inter
    53→* **System (Data):** Satoshi / SF Pro
    54→
    55→**Type Scale & Usage (Accessible Modular Scale)**
    56→
    57→| Level | Font Family | Size (px/rem) | Weight/Style | Line Height | Usage |
    58→| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    59→| **Heading 1 (Hero)** | Instrument Serif | 39px (2.441rem) | 600 Semi-Bold | 1.1 | Major project headers, album titles. |
    60→| **Heading 2 (Section)**| Instrument Serif | 33px (2.074rem) | 600 Semi-Bold | 1.2 | Artist names, core section titles. |
    61→| **Heading 3 (Card)** | Instrument Serif | 23px (1.440rem) | 600 Semi-Bold | 1.2 | Component/Card titles. |
    62→| **Body (Large)** | Inter | 19px (1.200rem) | 400 Regular | 1.5 | Featured biographies, lead paragraphs. |
    63→| **Body (Base)** | Inter | 16px (1.000rem) | 400 Regular | 1.5 | Standard long-form settings, descriptions. |
    64→| **Labels (UI)** | Inter | 13px (0.833rem) | 500 Medium (Caps) | 1.0 (Fixed) | Sidebar navigation, buttons, tooltips. |
    65→| **System (Data)** | Satoshi / SF Pro | 13px (0.833rem) | 400 Regular (Mono) | 1.4 | Technical metadata (BPM, timestamps). |
    66→| **System (Micro)** | Satoshi / SF Pro | 11px (0.694rem) | 400 Regular (Mono) | 1.4 | File sizes, timestamp suffixes. |
    67→
    68→---
    69→
    70→## 3. Spacing, Radius & Geometry
    71→
    72→**Spacing System (8-Point Grid)**
    73→
    74→* `2px` (Minor) — Gap between grouped monospace data items.
    75→* `4px` (Tight) — Padding inside small interactive toggles or input boundaries.
    76→* `8px` (Base) — Margins parsing list items within the Theory Inspector.
    77→* `16px` (Default) — Standard padding for Surface Cards and Modal dialogues.
    78→* `32px` (Macro) — Spatial separation between Sandbox and Sidebar.
    79→
    80→**Border Radius System**
    81→
    82→* `0px` (Sharp) — Edges connected to the VexFlow canvas, red logic lines, and algorithmic constraints.
    83→* `2px` (Micro) — Tooltips and metadata pills.
    84→* `4px` (Standard) — Interactive buttons, overrides, and toggles (signifying human touch).
    85→* `50%` (Circular) — Singularly reserved for the draggable noteheads.
    86→
    87→---
    88→
    89→## 4. Layout & Responsiveness
    90→
    91→To ensure the Glass-box UI degrades gracefully while preserving the VexFlow canvas:
    92→
    93→* **Breakpoint Constraints:**
    94→  * `lg` (≥1024px): 70% Sandbox / 30% Theory Inspector (Side-by-Side).
    95→  * `md` (768px - 1023px): 60% Sandbox / 40% Theory Inspector.
    96→  * `sm` (<768px): Stacked. The `InteractiveTactileSandbox` takes 100% width. The `TheoryInspectorSidebar` becomes a bottom-anchored pull-up drawer (BottomSheet) triggered by selection.
    97→* **VexFlow Scaling:** The VexFlow SVG target `div` must NOT use fixed pixel widths. It must use `w-full h-full` and rely on a `ResizeObserver` hook to trigger a re-render of `Vex.Flow.Factory` when container dimensions change.
    98→* **Typography Scaling:** Use CSS `clamp()` for headings to prevent horizontal overflow in Inspector panels.
    99→
   100→---
   101→
   102→## 5. Motion & Interaction Rules
   103→
   104→* **Note Drag Behavior:** Notes move discretely via a snapping coordinate system corresponding to semitones/diatonic steps. Continuous, fluid dragging (analog-style physical interpolation) is forbidden to enforce strict symbolic logic.
   105→* **Violation Reveal Timing:** Zero latency. Red Line systems appear simultaneously with the drop event/keyboard confirmation. No "fade-in" animations are permitted.
   106→* **Repair Transitions:** When switching between user state and recommended repair state, employ a crisp `0ms` swap. Linear interpolation (`100ms max`) reserved strictly for programmatic voice-leading paths in SVG nodes only.
   107→* **Forbidden Animation:** No bouncing, spring physics, or easing functions that imply weight or physical realism.
   108→
   109→---
   110→
   111→## 6. Iconography System
   112→
   113→* **Style:** Sharp, linear, 1.5px stroke weight (2px on hover). Filled icons are explicitly forbidden unless representing active global state booleans.
   114→* **Visual Metaphors:** Avoid consumer UI metaphors (no "magic wands" for generation). Use drafting and mechanical metaphors (e.g., compasses, set squares, logic gates).
   115→* **Semantic Geometry:**
   116→  * **Sharp Angles (Triangles/Rectangles):** Denote algorithmic rules, calculations, and constraints.
   117→  * **Curves/Circles:** Denote user input, human interaction, or override functions.
   118→
   119→---
   120→
   121→## 7. Accessibility, Operability, Content & Voice (POUR)
   122→
   123→**1. Perceivable & Operable**
   124→
   125→* **Color Independence:** Semantic color cues must always be paired with secondary visual signifiers (e.g., solid line vs. dashed line).
   126→* **Edit-Authority via Keyboard:** Full edit-authority of the VexFlow state must be possible via Arrow and Modifier keys without a pointer device. Tab sequences must fluidly navigate between the Sandbox and Inspector layers.
   127→
   128→**2. Understandable & Robust**
   129→
   130→* **Screen Reader Handling:** Draggable Note Tokens inject ARIA labels formatted as `[Voice]: [Pitch] [Duration]` (e.g., `Soprano: C5 Quarter Note`).
   131→* **Live Regions for Causality:** Rule violations announce immediately as aria-live critical alerts: `Alert: Parallel Fifth detected between Soprano and Tenor`.
   132→* **Semantic DOM Elements:** SVG interaction must map to standard, accessible HTML `<button>` and `<input>` proxy elements within the React application tree.
   133→
   134→**3. Content & Voice Guidelines**
   135→
   136→* **Tone:** Scholarly, objective, calm, and non-judgmental. Do not use conversational filler or emotional validation.
   137→* **AI Explanations:** Confined strictly to the Theory Inspector panel to prevent cluttering the Sandbox. Use precise language like "Stylistic Observation: Doubled Leading Tone."
   138→
   139→---
   140→
   141→## 8. Developer Hand-off & Schema Definition
   142→
   143→To effectively generate production-ready React/VexFlow code without hallucination, all components and logic must adhere to the following contracts.
   144→
   145→### A. State Management & Data Ontology (Zustand)
   146→
   147→The core of the application must rely on a strictly typed, immutable representation of musical state.
   148→
   149→```typescript
   150→// types/music.ts
   151→
   152→/**
   153→ * Employs the "Theory Named" strategy. 
   154→ * Pitches must be explicitly defined using scientific pitch notation.
   155→ */
   156→export type PitchClass = 'C' | 'C#' | 'D' | 'D#' | 'E' | 'F' | 'F#' | 'G' | 'G#' | 'A' | 'A#' | 'B';
   157→export type Octave = 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7;
   158→export type Duration = 'w' | 'h' | 'q' | '8' | '16'; // VexFlow compatible
   159→
   160→export interface NoteEvent {
   161→  id: string; // Unique UUID
   162→  pitch: `${PitchClass}${Octave}`; 
   163→  duration: Duration;
   164→  voice: 'Soprano' | 'Alto' | 'Tenor' | 'Bass';
   165→  isUserModified: boolean; // Triggers UI 'Accent' color states
   166→}
   167→
   168→export interface TheoryViolation {
   169→  id: string;
   170→  ruleId: string; // e.g., 'RULE_PARALLEL_FIFTH'
   171→  severity: 'Violation' | 'Warning';
   172→  involvedNoteIds: string[]; // Maps directly to Red Line SVGs
   173→  isOverridden: boolean;
   174→}
   175→
   176→// store/useScoreStore.ts
   177→export interface ScoreState {
   178→  notes: NoteEvent[];
   179→  violations: TheoryViolation[];
   180→  selectedNoteId: string | null;
   181→  moveNote: (id: string, newPitch: `${PitchClass}${Octave}`) => void;
   182→  toggleOverride: (violationId: string) => void;
   183→}
   184→```
   185→
   186→### B. VexFlow / React Boundary Constraints
   187→
   188→Direct manipulation of the VexFlow canvas via virtual DOM updates is forbidden.
   189→
   190→* **The Rule of the Wrapper:** VexFlow rendering logic must be isolated within a `useEffect` hook that triggers re-renders *only* when the symbolic `ScoreState` changes or container resizes.
   191→* **Proxy Elements for POUR:** Invisible HTML `<button>` elements must be positioned absolutely over the VexFlow note coordinates to handle `onFocus`, `onKeyDown`, and `onClick` synthetic events, dispatching updates to Zustand.
   192→
   193→```typescript
   194→// components/organisms/StaffRenderer.tsx
   195→// Required implementation pattern
   196→
   197→export const StaffRenderer: React.FC = () => {
   198→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   199→  const notes = useScoreStore((state) => state.notes);
   200→
   201→  useEffect(() => {
   202→    if (!containerRef.current) return;
   203→    
   204→    // 1. Clear previous canvas
   205→    containerRef.current.innerHTML = '';
   206→    
   207→    // 2. Initialize VexFlow Formatter
   208→    const vf = new Vex.Flow.Factory({
   209→      renderer: { elementId: containerRef.current, width: containerRef.current.clientWidth, height: 200 }
   210→    });
   211→    
   212→    // 3. Map strictly typed NoteEvents to Vex.Flow.StaveNote
   213→    // ... Imperative VexFlow logic here ...
   214→    
   215→    vf.draw();
   216→  }, [notes]); // Re-render strictly bounded to state determinism AND resize events
   217→
   218→  return <div ref={containerRef} className="relative w-full h-full" />;
   219→};
   220→```
   221→
   222→### C. React Component Library (Atomic Specification)
   223→
   224→LLMs must implement the following Prop interfaces exactly as defined. Do not generate arbitrary local state; all core logic resides in Zustand.
   225→
   226→**Atoms**
   227→
   228→```typescript
   229→interface SemanticLabelProps {
   230→  type: 'Violation' | 'Warning' | 'Override' | 'Valid';
   231→  text: string;
   232→  className?: string;
   233→}
   234→
   235→interface ToggleSwitchBaseProps {
   236→  checked: boolean;
   237→  onChange: (checked: boolean) => void;
   238→  ariaLabel: string;
   239→  disabled?: boolean;
   240→}
   241→```
   242→
   243→**Molecules**
   244→
   245→```typescript
   246→interface DraggableNoteTokenProps {
   247→  id: string; // References NoteEvent UUID
   248→  pitch: string;
   249→  isFocused: boolean;
   250→  hasError: boolean;
   251→  onMove: (newPitch: string) => void;
   252→}
   253→
   254→interface TheoryViolationIndicatorProps {
   255→  id: string;
   256→  severity: 'Violation' | 'Warning';
   257→  points: { x: number; y: number }[]; // Computed BBox from VexFlow
   258→  isOverridden: boolean;
   259→}
   260→
   261→interface ConstraintControlProps {
   262→  currentLevel: 'Strict' | 'Standard' | 'Loose';
   263→  onLevelChange: (level: 'Strict' | 'Standard' | 'Loose') => void;
   264→}
   265→```
   266→
   267→**Organisms**
   268→
   269→```typescript
   270→interface TheoryExplanationCardProps {
   271→  violationId: string;
   272→  ruleId: string;
   273→  severity: 'Violation' | 'Warning';
   274→  academicDescription: string; // Scholarly tone enforced
   275→  isOverridden: boolean;
   276→  onOverrideToggle: (violationId: string) => void;
   277→}
   278→```
   279→
   280→---
   281→
   282→## 9. Music Theory Rendering Axioms
   283→
   284→To utilize the **"Theory Named" strategy** effectively, the UI visually translates axiomatic music logic under these constraints:
   285→
   286→1. **Pitch vs. Spelling Strictness:** The system must differentiate between enharmonic equivalents (e.g., C# vs. Db). Interpreting intervals based on MIDI note numbers is forbidden. VexFlow must receive the exact theoretical spelling from the Backend.
   287→2. **Violation Coordinates (The "Red Line" Tooltips):** When drawing the `TheoryViolationIndicator` molecule over VexFlow output, the bounding box of the specific `StaveNote` instances involved must be calculated. The Red Line is an SVG overlay using React portal logic relative to the `containerRef`, ensuring decoupling from VexFlow computation.
   288→3. **Non-Blocking Edits:** The handler for a `moveNote` action must inherently accept *any* pitch modification. The UI renders the new pitch instantly, and evaluating constraints follows afterwards. The UI must never reject a move action defensively (Expressive Sovereignty).
   289→
   290→---
   291→
   292→## 10. Design Tokens (JSON Base)

    17→>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
    18→  const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();
    19→  const [mounted, setMounted] = React.useState(false);
    20→
    21→  // Avoid Hydration Mismatch
    22→  React.useEffect(() => {
    23→    setMounted(true);
    24→  }, []);
    25→
    26→  if (!mounted) {
    27→    // Render a skeleton matching the layout to prevent CLS
    28→    return <div className="w-[72px] h-[32px] rounded-full" />;
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  const isDark = theme === "dark";
    32→
    33→  return (
    34→    <button
    35→      ref={ref}
    36→      onClick={() => setTheme(isDark ? "light" : "dark")}
    37→      className={cn(
    38→        "relative flex items-center w-[72px] h-[32px] rounded-full p-[1px] transition-colors duration-200",
    39→        isDark
    40→          ? "bg-[#2D1817] ring-1 ring-inset ring-[#A55B3766]"
    41→          : "bg-[#C8B8B6] ring-1 ring-inset ring-[#D2B48C]",
    42→        className,
    43→      )}
    44→      aria-label="Toggle Theme"
    45→      {...props}
    46→    >
    47→      <div className="absolute inset-x-0 mx-auto flex w-full justify-between items-center px-[2px]">
    48→        {/* Sun Container */}
    49→        <div
    50→          className={cn(
    51→            "flex items-center justify-center w-[28px] h-[28px] rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 z-10",
    52→            !isDark ? "bg-[#FFB300]" : "bg-transparent",
    53→          )}
    54→        >
    55→          <Sun
    56→            className={cn(
    57→              "w-4 h-4 transition-colors duration-200",
    58→              !isDark ? "text-[#2D1817]" : "text-[#A55B3766]",
    59→            )}
    60→            strokeWidth={2}
    61→          />
    62→        </div>
    63→
    64→        {/* Moon Container */}
    65→        <div
    66→          className={cn(

    75→            )}
    76→            strokeWidth={2}
    77→          />
    78→        </div>
    79→      </div>
    80→    </button>
    81→  );

    10→
    11→/**

    16→export const ScoreDropzone = React.forwardRef<

    20→  const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false);

    22→  const handleDragOver = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    23→    e.preventDefault();
    24→    setIsHovered(true);
    25→  };
    26→

    28→    e.preventDefault();
    29→    setIsHovered(false);
    30→  };
    31→
    32→  const handleDrop = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    33→    e.preventDefault();
    34→    setIsHovered(false);

    48→      )}
    49→      {...props}
    50→    >
    51→      {/* Node ktaiB: The massive 1439x648 Dropzone Canvas */}
    52→      <div
    53→        onDragOver={handleDragOver}
    54→        onDragLeave={handleDragLeave}
    55→        onDrop={handleDrop}
    56→        className={cn(
    57→          "relative flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full max-w-[1439px]",

```text
     1→/**
     2→ * noteFactory.ts
     3→ * Symbolic note generation for HarmonyForge Tactile Sandbox.
     4→ * Output: VexFlow-compatible StaveNote descriptors (no audio synthesis).
     5→ */
     6→
     7→export type Duration = "w" | "h" | "q" | "8" | "16";
     8→
     9→export interface SymbolicNote {
    10→  /** VexFlow key format, e.g. "c/4" */
    11→  key: string;
    12→  duration: Duration;
    13→  /** Optional: MIDI pitch for Tone.js playback */
    14→  midi: number;
    15→}
    16→
    17→export interface Measure {
    18→  notes: SymbolicNote[];
    19→  /** e.g. "4/4" */
    20→  timeSignature: string;
    21→}
    22→
    23→// ─── C Major scale, octave 4 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    24→const C_MAJOR_SCALE: Array<{ key: string; midi: number }> = [
    25→  { key: "c/4", midi: 60 },
    26→  { key: "d/4", midi: 62 },
    27→  { key: "e/4", midi: 64 },
    28→  { key: "f/4", midi: 65 },
    29→  { key: "g/4", midi: 67 },
    30→  { key: "a/4", midi: 69 },
    31→  { key: "b/4", midi: 71 },
    32→  { key: "c/5", midi: 72 },
    33→];
    34→
    35→/**
    36→ * Generates `measureCount` measures of random quarter notes drawn from
    37→ * the provided scale. Deterministic when `seed` is supplied (LCG RNG).
    38→ */
    39→export function generateMeasures(
    40→  measureCount = 2,
    41→  beatsPerMeasure = 4,
    42→  scale = C_MAJOR_SCALE,
    43→  seed?: number
    44→): Measure[] {
    45→  let state = seed ?? Date.now();
    46→  const lcg = (): number => {
    47→    state = (state * 1664525 + 1013904223) & 0xffffffff;
    48→    return (state >>> 0) / 0xffffffff;
    49→  };
    50→
    51→  return Array.from({ length: measureCount }, () => ({
    52→    timeSignature: `${beatsPerMeasure}/4`,
    53→    notes: Array.from({ length: beatsPerMeasure }, () => {
    54→      const entry = scale[Math.floor(lcg() * scale.length)];
    55→      return { key: entry.key, duration: "q" as Duration, midi: entry.midi };
    56→    }),
    57→  }));
    58→}
    59→
    60→/**
    61→ * Converts SymbolicNote[] → plain VexFlow StaveNote constructor args.
    62→ * Import `StaveNote` from "vexflow" to hydrate these.
    63→ */
    64→export function toVexFlowArgs(
    65→  note: SymbolicNote
    66→): { keys: string[]; duration: string } {
    67→  return { keys: [note.key], duration: note.duration };
    68→}
    69→
```

    57→   MASTER.md §1: Antique White bg, Cherry Wood surface

    59→:root {
    60→  --hf-bg:              var(--sonata-bg, #fdf5e6);
    61→  --hf-surface:         var(--sonata-surface, #9e4b3e);
    62→  --hf-detail:          var(--sonata-detail, #d2b48c);
    63→  --hf-accent:          var(--sonata-accent, #ffb300);
    64→  --hf-text-primary:    #1a1a1a;
    65→  --hf-text-secondary:  #6b5740;
    66→  --hf-detail-rgb:      210, 180, 140;
    67→
    68→  /* Playground gradient — Node 80t2V (Light) */
    69→  --hf-bg-grad-start:   #fdf5e6;
    70→  --hf-bg-grad-end:     #e8dcda;
    71→
    72→  /* Staff lines use detail color per design system */
    73→  --hf-staff-line:      var(--sonata-detail, #d2b48c);
    74→  /* Canvas bg slightly off-white for score paper feel */
    75→  --hf-canvas-bg:       #faf0dc;
    76→  /* Toolbar/dock surface */
    77→  --hf-toolbar-bg:      rgba(253, 245, 230, 0.92);
    78→  --hf-toolbar-border:  rgba(210, 180, 140, 0.4);
    79→}
    80→
    81→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    82→   Nocturne — Dark Mode
    83→   MASTER.md §1: Dark Walnut bg, Cognac surface
    84→   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    85→.dark {
    86→  --hf-bg:              var(--nocturne-bg, #3e2723);
    87→  --hf-surface:         var(--nocturne-surface, #a55b37);
    88→  --hf-detail:          var(--nocturne-detail, #2d1817);
    89→  --hf-accent:          var(--nocturne-accent, #ffb300);
    90→  --hf-text-primary:    #f8f8f8;
    91→  --hf-text-secondary:  #b0a090;
    92→  --hf-detail-rgb:      45, 24, 23;
    93→
    94→  /* Playground gradient — Node PnDXj (Dark) */
    95→  --hf-bg-grad-start:   #3e2723;
    96→  --hf-bg-grad-end:     #2d1817;
    97→
    98→  --hf-staff-line:      var(--nocturne-detail, #5a3a30);
    99→  --hf-canvas-bg:       #2a1a16;
   100→  --hf-toolbar-bg:      rgba(62, 39, 35, 0.92);
   101→  --hf-toolbar-border:  rgba(45, 24, 23, 0.6);
   102→}
   103→
   104→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   105→   Font utility classes — match .pen fontFamily values exactly
   106→   Use className="font-brand" / "font-body" / "font-mono" etc.
   107→   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   108→.font-brand   { font-family: var(--font-fraunces), 'Fraunces', serif; }
   109→.font-serif   { font-family: var(--font-instrument), 'Instrument Serif', serif; }
   110→.font-body    { font-family: var(--font-inter), 'Inter', sans-serif; }
   111→.font-mono    { font-family: var(--font-ibm-plex-mono), 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; }
   112→.font-system  { font-family: 'Satoshi', 'SF Pro', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; }
   113→
   114→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   115→   Base resets & global rules
   116→   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   117→*, *::before, *::after {
   118→  box-sizing: border-box;
   119→}
   120→
   121→html, body {
   122→  height: 100%;
   123→  overflow: hidden;
   124→  background-color: var(--hf-bg);
   125→  color: var(--hf-text-primary);
   126→  font-family: var(--font-body);
   127→  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
   128→  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
   129→}
   130→
   131→/* Focus rings — POUR, MASTER.md §7 */
   132→:focus-visible {
   133→  outline: 2px solid var(--hf-accent);
   134→  outline-offset: 2px;
   135→}
   136→
   137→/* Skip-to-content — POUR, MASTER.md §7 */
   138→.skip-link {
   139→  position: absolute;
   140→  top: -9999px;
   141→  left: 50%;
   142→  transform: translateX(-50%);
   143→  background: var(--hf-accent);
   144→  color: #1a1a1a;
   145→  padding: 8px 16px;
   146→  border-radius: var(--radius-standard);
   147→  font-family: var(--font-body);
   148→  font-size: 0.833rem;
   149→  font-weight: 500;
   150→  z-index: var(--z-critical);
   151→  text-decoration: none;
   152→}
   153→.skip-link:focus {
   154→  top: 8px;
   155→}
   156→
   157→/* Reduced motion guard — MASTER.md §5 */
   158→@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
   159→  *, *::before, *::after {
   160→    transition-duration: 0ms !important;
   161→    animation-duration: 0ms !important;
   162→  }
   163→}
   164→
   165→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   166→   .pen File Token Aliases — exact names from HarmonyForge.pen
   167→   Maps $sonata-* / $nocturne-* design variables to CSS vars so
   168→   generated components can reference them verbatim as
   169→   var(--sonata-bg), var(--nocturne-detail), etc.
   170→   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   171→
   172→/* Sonata (Light) — active in default :root */
   173→:root {
   174→  --sonata-bg:         #FDF5E6;
   175→  --sonata-surface:    #9E4B3E;
   176→  --sonata-surface-10: #9E4B3E1A;
   177→  --sonata-surface-20: #9E4B3E33;
   178→  --sonata-surface-40: #9E4B3E66;
   179→  --sonata-surface-70: #9E4B3EB3;
   180→  --sonata-surface-90: #9E4B3EE6;
   181→  --sonata-detail:     #D2B48C;
   182→  --sonata-accent:     #FFB300;
   183→  --sonata-accent-10:  #FFB3001A;
   184→  --sonata-accent-70:  #FFB300B3;
   185→  --sonata-accent-90:  #FFB300E6;
   186→
   187→  /* Nocturne vars zeroed in light mode to prevent leakage */
   188→  --nocturne-bg:         transparent;
   189→  --nocturne-surface:    transparent;
   190→  --nocturne-surface-10: transparent;
   191→  --nocturne-surface-20: transparent;
   192→  --nocturne-surface-40: transparent;
   193→  --nocturne-surface-70: transparent;
   194→  --nocturne-surface-90: transparent;
   195→  --nocturne-detail:     transparent;
   196→  --nocturne-accent:     transparent;
   197→  --nocturne-accent-10:  transparent;
   198→  --nocturne-accent-70:  transparent;
   199→  --nocturne-accent-90:  transparent;
   200→
   201→  /* Text */
   202→  --text-on-light: #2D1817;
   203→  --text-on-dark:  #F8F8F8;
   204→
   205→  /* Neutrals (cross-theme) */
   206→  --neutral-50:  #F5F0EF;
   207→  --neutral-100: #E8DCDA;
   208→  --neutral-200: #C8B8B6;
   209→  --neutral-500: #7A6B69;
   210→  --neutral-700: #4A3B39;
   211→  --neutral-900: #1A1110;
   212→
   213→  /* Semantic — fixed, cross-theme */
   214→  --semantic-violation:    #D32F2F;
   215→  --semantic-violation-10: #D32F2F1A;
   216→  --semantic-violation-20: #D32F2F33;
   217→  --semantic-violation-70: #D32F2FB3;
   218→  --semantic-warning:      #1976D2;
   219→  --semantic-warning-10:   #1976D21A;
   220→  --semantic-warning-20:   #1976D233;
   221→  --semantic-warning-70:   #1976D2B3;
   222→  --semantic-override:     #7B1FA2;
   223→  --semantic-override-10:  #7B1FA21A;
   224→  --semantic-override-20:  #7B1FA233;
   225→  --semantic-override-70:  #7B1FA2B3;
   226→}
   227→
   228→/* Nocturne (Dark) — activated by .dark on <html> */
   229→.dark {
   230→  /* Sonata vars zeroed in dark mode */
   231→  --sonata-bg:         transparent;
   232→  --sonata-surface:    transparent;
   233→  --sonata-surface-10: transparent;
   234→  --sonata-surface-20: transparent;
   235→  --sonata-surface-40: transparent;
   236→  --sonata-surface-70: transparent;
   237→  --sonata-surface-90: transparent;
   238→  --sonata-detail:     transparent;
   239→  --sonata-accent:     transparent;
   240→  --sonata-accent-10:  transparent;
   241→  --sonata-accent-70:  transparent;
   242→  --sonata-accent-90:  transparent;
   243→
   244→  --nocturne-bg:         #3E2723;
   245→  --nocturne-surface:    #A55B37;
   246→  --nocturne-surface-10: #A55B371A;
   247→  --nocturne-surface-20: #A55B3733;
   248→  --nocturne-surface-40: #A55B3766;
   249→  --nocturne-surface-70: #A55B37B3;
   250→  --nocturne-surface-90: #A55B37E6;
   251→  --nocturne-detail:     #2D1817;
   252→  --nocturne-accent:     #FFB300;
   253→  --nocturne-accent-10:  #FFB3001A;
   254→  --nocturne-accent-70:  #FFB300B3;
   255→  --nocturne-accent-90:  #FFB300E6;
   256→
   257→  --text-on-light: #2D1817;
   258→  --text-on-dark:  #F8F8F8;
   259→}
   260→
   261→/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   262→   Score canvas — sharp edges, no radius per MASTER.md §3 */
   263→.score-canvas-container {
   264→  border-radius: var(--radius-sharp);
   265→  background-color: var(--hf-canvas-bg);
   266→}
   267→
   268→/* VexFlow SVG inherits text color correctly */
   269→.score-canvas-container svg text {
   270→  fill: var(--hf-text-primary);
   271→}
   272→.score-canvas-container svg .vf-stavenote path,
   273→.score-canvas-container svg .vf-stave path {
   274→  stroke: var(--hf-text-primary);
   275→  fill: var(--hf-text-primary);
   276→}
   277→

     1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import React, { useState } from "react";
     4→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     5→import { UploadPromptContent } from "@/components/molecules/UploadPromptContent";
     6→
     7→export interface ScoreDropzoneProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
     8→  onFileDrop?: (files: FileList) => void;
     9→}
    10→
    11→/**
    12→ * ScoreDropzone Organism
    13→ * Extracted from Pencil Node IDs: ktaiB / 3Jfj4
    14→ * Massive central dashed-border dropzone for importing MusicXML.
    15→ */
    16→export const ScoreDropzone = React.forwardRef<
    17→  HTMLDivElement,
    18→  ScoreDropzoneProps
    19→>(({ className, onFileDrop, ...props }, ref) => {
    20→  const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false);
    21→
    22→  const handleDragOver = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    23→    e.preventDefault();
    24→    setIsHovered(true);
    25→  };
    26→
    27→  const handleDragLeave = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    28→    e.preventDefault();
    29→    setIsHovered(false);
    30→  };
    31→
    32→  const handleDrop = (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    33→    e.preventDefault();
    34→    setIsHovered(false);
    35→    if (e.dataTransfer.files && onFileDrop) {
    36→      onFileDrop(e.dataTransfer.files);
    37→    }
    38→  };
    39→
    40→  return (
    41→    <div
    42→      ref={ref}
    43→      className={cn(
    44→        // Outer dimensions mimicking Node 80t2V central bounding box.
    45→        // We set 1513px width to accommodate the stand (n4ubU), and let it center.
    46→        "relative flex flex-col items-center w-full max-w-[1513px] mx-auto mt-auto",
    47→        className,
    48→      )}
    49→      {...props}
    50→    >
    51→      {/* Node ktaiB: The massive 1439x648 Dropzone Canvas */}
    52→      <div
    53→        onDragOver={handleDragOver}
    54→        onDragLeave={handleDragLeave}
    55→        onDrop={handleDrop}
    56→        className={cn(
    57→          "relative flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full max-w-[1439px]",
    58→          "h-[648px] rounded-t-[20px] z-10",
    59→          "border-2 border-dashed transition-all duration-300",
    60→          isHovered
    61→            ? "border-[#2d1817] bg-[#7a6b69]/5 dark:border-white"
    62→            : "border-[#7a6b69] border-opacity-50 hover:border-opacity-100",
    63→        )}
    64→      >
    65→        <div className="absolute inset-0 -z-10 rounded-t-[20px] bg-linear-to-b from-[#fdf5e6] to-[#d2b48c] opacity-40 mix-blend-multiply dark:opacity-10" />
    66→        <UploadPromptContent />
    67→      </div>
    68→
    69→      {/* Node n4ubU: The 1513x70 wooden stand base that the canvas rests inside/on top of. */}
    70→      {/* We apply a negative margin so the canvas overlaps the top lip of the stand. */}
    71→      <div className="relative flex justify-center w-full h-[70px] bg-[#dec7a7] rounded-[20px] overflow-hidden border border-black/10 z-0 -mt-[20px]">
    72→        {/* Dark left accent rectangle (Node: 79ha5) */}
    73→        <div className="absolute left-[50%] -translate-x-[20px] bottom-0 w-[48px] h-[390px] bg-[#1f1f1f] border border-black/10" />
    74→
    75→        {/* Wooden accent center (Node: 1ZRgJ) */}

    77→      </div>

```text
     1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import * as React from "react";
     4→import { useTheme } from "next-themes";
     5→import { Sun, Moon } from "lucide-react";
     6→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     7→
     8→/**
     9→ * ThemeToggle Atom
    10→ * Extracts Pencil Node IDs:
    11→ * - LqI9j (Light Mode Active state)
    12→ * - 9DmQ7 (Dark Mode Active state)
    13→ */
    14→export const ThemeToggle = React.forwardRef<
    15→  HTMLButtonElement,
    16→  React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>
    17→>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
    18→  const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();
    19→  const [mounted, setMounted] = React.useState(false);
    20→
    21→  // Avoid Hydration Mismatch
    22→  React.useEffect(() => {
    23→    setMounted(true);
    24→  }, []);
    25→
    26→  if (!mounted) {
    27→    // Render a skeleton matching the layout to prevent CLS
    28→    return <div className="w-[72px] h-[32px] rounded-full" />;
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  const isDark = theme === "dark";
    32→
    33→  return (
    34→    <button
    35→      ref={ref}
    36→      onClick={() => setTheme(isDark ? "light" : "dark")}
    37→      className={cn(
    38→        "relative flex items-center w-[72px] h-[32px] rounded-full p-[1px] transition-colors duration-200",
    39→        isDark
    40→          ? "bg-[#2D1817] ring-1 ring-inset ring-[#A55B3766]"
    41→          : "bg-[#C8B8B6] ring-1 ring-inset ring-[#D2B48C]",
    42→        className,
    43→      )}
    44→      aria-label="Toggle Theme"
    45→      {...props}
    46→    >
    47→      <div className="absolute inset-x-0 mx-auto flex w-full justify-between items-center px-[2px]">
    48→        {/* Sun Container */}
    49→        <div
    50→          className={cn(
    51→            "flex items-center justify-center w-[28px] h-[28px] rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 z-10",
    52→            !isDark ? "bg-[#FFB300]" : "bg-transparent",
    53→          )}
    54→        >
    55→          <Sun
    56→            className={cn(
    57→              "w-4 h-4 transition-colors duration-200",
    58→              !isDark ? "text-[#2D1817]" : "text-[#A55B3766]",
    59→            )}
    60→            strokeWidth={2}
    61→          />
    62→        </div>
    63→
    64→        {/* Moon Container */}
    65→        <div
    66→          className={cn(
    67→            "flex items-center justify-center w-[28px] h-[28px] rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 z-10",
    68→            isDark ? "bg-[#FFB300]" : "bg-transparent",
    69→          )}
    70→        >
    71→          <Moon
    72→            className={cn(
    73→              "w-4 h-4 transition-colors duration-200",
    74→              isDark ? "text-[#1A1110]" : "text-[#4A3B39]",
    75→            )}
    76→            strokeWidth={2}
    77→          />
    78→        </div>
    79→      </div>
    80→    </button>
    81→  );
    82→});
    83→
    84→ThemeToggle.displayName = "ThemeToggle";
    85→

     1→import { BrandTitle } from "@/components/atoms/BrandTitle";

     6→export default function SandboxPage() {
     7→  return (
     8→    <PlaygroundBackground className="flex flex-col items-center justify-start h-screen overflow-hidden">
     9→      {/* 
    10→        Semantic Header Row: 
    11→        1439px constraint matches the main grid wrapper width (from Node ktaiB).
    12→        A 3-column flex grid ensures the BrandTitle is always perfectly dead-center 
    13→        while the ThemeToggle is pinned to the far right.
    14→        px-8 padding is ONLY on the header — not the outer wrapper — so the music
    15→        stand can expand fully to the screen bottom with no gap.
    16→      */}
    17→      <header className="w-full max-w-[1439px] flex items-center justify-between pt-8 px-4 pb-0">
    18→        {/* Left Spacer (matches width of toggle to ensure absolute center alignment) */}
    19→        <div className="w-[72px]" aria-hidden="true" />
    20→
    21→        <BrandTitle />
    22→
    23→        <ThemeToggle />
    24→      </header>
    25→
    26→      {/* 
    27→        Container configured to claim all remaining vertical space to the absolute bottom edge.
    28→        min-h-0 is required to prevent the flex child from overflowing out of the viewport.
    29→        No mt-8 — we want the stand flush to the bottom.
    30→      */}
    31→      <div className="flex-1 w-full min-h-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-end mt-10">
    32→        <DropzoneCopy className="h-full w-auto" />
    33→      </div>
    34→    </PlaygroundBackground>

# Plan: Document Screen — Arrangement Setup UI

## Context
This is the second screen in the HarmonyForge flow: after a score is uploaded on `/sandbox`, the user lands on `/document` to configure their SATB arrangement. The screen is a two-panel layout: a **Score Preview Panel** (left) showing the uploaded score with metadata, and an **Ensemble Builder Panel** (right) for selecting voices/instruments. This screen corresponds to design frame `iNmP7` (Sonata/Light) and `lXHYH` (Nocturne/Dark) in `HarmonyForge.pen`.

All components are static/presentational at this stage. No Zustand store changes, no backend calls. The VexFlow canvas renders a placeholder staff grid (as-designed). Dropdown state is local `useState`. This is purely the UI layer.

---

## Design → Component Inventory

| Node ID | Name (design) | Component file | Atom/Molecule/Organism |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tHpLP` | Header | `organisms/DocumentHeader.tsx` | Organism |
| `86KW2` | Logo | `atoms/LogoLockup.tsx` | Atom (new — sandbox had BrandTitle only) |
| `CCRux` | StepBar | `molecules/StepBar.tsx` | Molecule |
| `LqI9j` | ThemeToggle | `atoms/ThemeToggle.tsx` | **Reuse existing** |
| `pGKLs` | Score Preview Panel | `organisms/ScorePreviewPanel.tsx` | Organism |
| `RctEd` | PlaybackBar | `molecules/PlaybackBar.tsx` | Molecule |
| `SnayI` | Re-upload Button | inline in PlaybackBar | — |
| `ZlAUA` | Ensemble Builder Panel | `organisms/EnsembleBuilderPanel.tsx` | Organism |
| `iVLue` | Voice List (4 rows) | `molecules/VoiceDropdown.tsx` | Molecule (×4) |
| `LtBtZ` | Ensemble Preview Card | `molecules/EnsemblePreviewCard.tsx` | Molecule |
| `9c48S` | Chip Row | `atoms/PartChip.tsx` | Atom |
| `rJKG6` | Generate Harmonies CTA | inline in EnsembleBuilderPanel | — |

---

## Token Mapping (Light → Dark)

| Role | Sonata (Light) | Nocturne (Dark) | CSS var |
|---|---|---|---|
| Page / Panel BG | `#FDF5E6` | `#3E2723` | `var(--hf-bg)` |
| Ensemble panel BG | `#F5F0EF` (`neutral-50`) | `#2D1817` (`nocturne-detail`) | `dark:bg-[var(--nocturne-detail)]` |
| Surface tint | `#9E4B3E1A` | `#A55B371A` | `var(--sonata-surface-10)` / `var(--nocturne-surface-10)` → use `bg-[var(--hf-surface)]/10` |
| Border / detail | `#D2B48C` | `#A55B3766` | `var(--hf-detail)` light / `var(--nocturne-surface-40)` dark |
| Header bottom border | `#D2B48C` | `#A55B3766` | same as above |
| Primary text | `#2D1817` | `#F8F8F8` | `var(--text-on-light)` / `var(--text-on-dark)` |
| Secondary text | `#D2B48C` | `#B0A090` | `var(--hf-text-sub)` |
| Accent | `#FFB300` | `#FFB300` | `var(--hf-accent)` |
| LogoMark gradient | `#9E4B3E → #9E4B3EE6` | `#A55B37 → #A55B37E6` | `var(--hf-surface)` at 100%/90% |

**Voice semantic colors (cross-theme, fixed):**
- Soprano: `--semantic-violation` `#D32F2F`
- Alto: `--semantic-warning` `#1976D2`
- Tenor: `--semantic-accent` `#FFB300` (= `--hf-accent`)
- Bass: `--semantic-override` `#7B1FA2`

---

## Files to Create / Modify

src/components/atoms/LogoLockup.tsx
src/components/atoms/PartChip.tsx
src/components/molecules/StepBar.tsx
src/components/molecules/PlaybackBar.tsx
src/components/molecules/VoiceDropdown.tsx
src/components/molecules/EnsemblePreviewCard.tsx

\```

src/app/document/page.tsx   ← currently a shell, wire up the full layout

---

## Component Specifications

### 1. `LogoLockup` Atom
**Node:** `86KW2`
- 32×32 `LogoMark` frame: gradient bg `from-[var(--hf-surface)] to-[var(--hf-surface)]/90` at 135deg, radius 8, music icon (lucide `music`, `#2D1817` / dark `#F8F8F8`)
- "HarmonyForge" text: `font-brand text-[22px] font-normal` color `text-[var(--text-on-light)] dark:text-[var(--text-on-dark)]`
- Gap 10, flex row, items-center

### 2. `PartChip` Atom
**Node:** `9c48S` children
Props: `label: string`, `color: 'soprano' | 'alto' | 'tenor' | 'bass'`, `onRemove?: () => void`
- Pill shape, radius 20, padding `[4,10]`
- Background: `{color}1A` (10% opacity tint of semantic color)
- Text: semantic color, IBM Plex Mono 10, `"{label} ×"`
- `aria-label={Remove ${label}}` on remove button

### 3. `StepBar` Molecule
**Node:** `CCRux`
Props: `currentStep: 1 | 2 | 3`
Steps: `[{n: 1, label: "Upload"}, {n: 2, label: "Arrange"}, {n: 3, label: "Sandbox"}]`
- Done steps: amber pill (`bg-[var(--hf-accent)]`), check icon, IBM Plex Mono 11 500, text `#1a0f0c`
- Active step: surface pill (`bg-[var(--hf-surface)]`), dot (6×6 ellipse amber), white text (`#F5F0EF`)
- Connector lines: 24px wide, 1px tall — amber if connecting two done steps, surface color otherwise
- Gap 8 between elements

## Approved Plan:
# Plan: Document Screen — Arrangement Setup UI

## Context
This is the second screen in the HarmonyForge flow: after a score is uploaded on `/sandbox`, the user lands on `/document` to configure their SATB arrangement. The screen is a two-panel layout: a **Score Preview Panel** (left) showing the uploaded score with metadata, and an **Ensemble Builder Panel** (right) for selecting voices/instruments. This screen corresponds to design frame `iNmP7` (Sonata/Light) and `lXHYH` (Nocturne/Dark) in `HarmonyForge.pen`.

All components are static/presentational at this stage. No Zustand store changes, no backend calls. The VexFlow canvas renders a placeholder staff grid (as-designed). Dropdown state is local `useState`. This is purely the UI layer.

---

## Design → Component Inventory

| Node ID | Name (design) | Component file | Atom/Molecule/Organism |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tHpLP` | Header | `organisms/DocumentHeader.tsx` | Organism |
| `86KW2` | Logo | `atoms/LogoLockup.tsx` | Atom (new — sandbox had BrandTitle only) |
| `CCRux` | StepBar | `molecules/StepBar.tsx` | Molecule |
| `LqI9j` | ThemeToggle | `atoms/ThemeToggle.tsx` | **Reuse existing** |
| `pGKLs` | Score Preview Panel | `organisms/ScorePreviewPanel.tsx` | Organism |
| `RctEd` | PlaybackBar | `molecules/PlaybackBar.tsx` | Molecule |
| `SnayI` | Re-upload Button | inline in PlaybackBar | — |
| `ZlAUA` | Ensemble Builder Panel | `organisms/EnsembleBuilderPanel.tsx` | Organism |
| `iVLue` | Voice List (4 rows) | `molecules/VoiceDropdown.tsx` | Molecule (×4) |
| `LtBtZ` | Ensemble Preview Card | `molecules/EnsemblePreviewCard.tsx` | Molecule |
| `9c48S` | Chip Row | `atoms/PartChip.tsx` | Atom |
| `rJKG6` | Generate Harmonies CTA | inline in EnsembleBuilderPanel | — |

## Token Mapping (Light → Dark)

| Role | Sonata (Light) | Nocturne (Dark) | CSS var |
|---|---|---|---|
| Page / Panel BG | `#FDF5E6` | `#3E2723` | `var(--hf-bg)` |
| Ensemble panel BG | `#F5F0EF` (`neutral-50`) | `#2D1817` (`nocturne-detail`) | `dark:bg-[var(--nocturne-detail)]` |
| Surface tint | `#9E4B3E1A` | `#A55B371A` | `var(--sonata-surface-10)` / `var(--nocturne-surface-10)` → use `bg-[var(--hf-surface)]/10` |
| Border / detail | `#D2B48C` | `#A55B3766` | `var(--hf-detail)` light / `var(--nocturne-surface-40)` dark |
| Header bottom border | `#D2B48C` | `#A55B3766` | same as above |
| Primary text | `#2D1817` | `#F8F8F8` | `var(--text-on-light)` / `var(--text-on-dark)` |
| Secondary text | `#D2B48C` | `#B0A090` | `var(--hf-text-sub)` |
| Accent | `#FFB300` | `#FFB300` | `var(--hf-accent)` |
| LogoMark gradient | `#9E4B3E → #9E4B3EE6` | `#A55B37 → #A55B37E6` | `var(--hf-surface)` at 100%/90% |

**Voice semantic colors (cross-theme, fixed):**
- Soprano: `--semantic-violation` `#D32F2F`
- Alto: `--semantic-warning` `#1976D2`
- Tenor: `--semantic-accent` `#FFB300` (= `--hf-accent`)
- Bass: `--semantic-override` `#7B1FA2`

import React from "react";
import { Music } from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

export interface LogoLockupProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {}

/**
 * LogoLockup Atom
 * Extracted from Pencil Node ID: 86KW2 ("Logo")
 * LogoMark (32×32 gradient frame, music icon) + "HarmonyForge" brand text.
 * Used in DocumentHeader. Separate from BrandTitle (which is the large 57px hero variant).
 */
export const LogoLockup = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, LogoLockupProps>(
  ({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <div
        ref={ref}
        className={cn("flex items-center gap-[10px]", className)}
        {...props}
      >
        {/* Node bMIr7: LogoMark — 32×32, gradient bg, music icon */}
        <div
          className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-[8px] shrink-0"
          style={{
            background:
              "linear-gradient(135deg, var(--hf-surface) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 90%, transparent) 100%)",
          }}
          aria-hidden="true"
        >
          <Music
            className="w-4 h-4"
            style={{ color: "var(--text-on-light)" }}
            strokeWidth={2}
          />
        </div>

        {/* Node TDV8d: Brand wordmark */}
        <span

import React from "react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

export type VoiceType = "soprano" | "alto" | "tenor" | "bass";

/** Semantic colors per voice — fixed, cross-theme (MASTER.md §1) */
const VOICE_COLORS: Record<VoiceType, { text: string; bg: string }> = {
  soprano: { text: "#D32F2F", bg: "#D32F2F1A" },
  alto:    { text: "#1976D2", bg: "#1976D21A" },
  tenor:   { text: "#FFB300", bg: "#FFB3001A" },
  bass:    { text: "#7B1FA2", bg: "#7B1FA21A" },
};

export interface PartChipProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement> {
  label: string;
  voice: VoiceType;
  onRemove?: () => void;
}

/**
 * PartChip Atom
 * Extracted from Pencil Node ID: 9c48S ("ChipRow") children
 * Dismissible voice/instrument chip — color keyed by voice semantic token.
 */
export const PartChip = React.forwardRef<HTMLSpanElement, PartChipProps>(
  ({ label, voice, onRemove, className, ...props }, ref) => {
    const { text, bg } = VOICE_COLORS[voice];

    return (
      <span
        ref={ref}
        className={cn(
          "inline-flex items-center rounded-full font-mono text-[10px] font-normal leading-none",
          "px-[10px] py-[4px]",
          className,
        )}
        style={{ color: text, backgroundColor: bg }}
        {...props}
      >
        {label}
        {onRemove && (
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={onRemove}
            className="ml-1 leading-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-current rounded-full"
            aria-label={`Remove ${label}`}
          >
            ×
          </button>
        )}
      </span>
    );
  },
);

PartChip.displayName = "PartChip";

```

```tsx
import React from "react";
import { Check } from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

export interface StepBarProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  /** 1 = Upload, 2 = Arrange, 3 = Sandbox */
  currentStep: 1 | 2 | 3;
}

const STEPS = [
  { n: 1, label: "Upload" },
  { n: 2, label: "Arrange" },
  { n: 3, label: "Sandbox" },
] as const;

/**
 * StepBar Molecule
 * Extracted from Pencil Node ID: CCRux ("StepBar")
 * Three-step progress indicator: done (amber pill + check), active (surface pill + dot), pending (dim).
 * Steps < currentStep → done. Step === currentStep → active. Steps > currentStep → pending.
 */
export const StepBar = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, StepBarProps>(
  ({ currentStep, className, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <div
        ref={ref}
        className={cn("flex items-center gap-[8px]", className)}
        role="list"
        aria-label="Progress steps"
        {...props}
      >
        {STEPS.map((step, i) => {
          const isDone = step.n < currentStep;
          const isActive = step.n === currentStep;
          const isPending = step.n > currentStep;

          return (
            <React.Fragment key={step.n}>
              {/* Step pill */}
              <div
                role="listitem"
                aria-current={isActive ? "step" : undefined}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center gap-[5px] rounded-full px-[12px] py-[6px]",
                  "font-mono text-[11px] font-medium leading-none whitespace-nowrap",
                  isDone && "bg-[var(--hf-accent)]",
                  isActive && "bg-[var(--hf-surface)]",
                  isPending && "bg-[var(--hf-surface)]/40",
                )}
              >
                {isDone && (
                  <Check
                    className="w-3 h-3 shrink-0"
                    style={{ color: "#1a0f0c" }}
                    strokeWidth={2.5}
                    aria-hidden="true"
                  />
                )}

                {isActive && (
                  <span
                    className="w-[6px] h-[6px] rounded-full shrink-0"
                    style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-accent)" }}
                    aria-hidden="true"
                  />
                )}

                <span
                  style={{
                    color: isDone
                      ? "#1a0f0c"
                      : isActive
                        ? "#F5F0EF"
                        : "var(--hf-text-sub)",
                  }}
                >
                  {step.n} {step.label}
                </span>
              </div>

              {/* Connector line between steps */}
              {i < STEPS.length - 1 && (
                <div
                  className="w-[24px] h-[1px] shrink-0"
                  style={{
                    backgroundColor:
                      step.n < currentStep
                        ? "var(--hf-accent)"
                        : "var(--hf-surface)",
                  }}
                  aria-hidden="true"
                />
              )}
            </React.Fragment>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    );
  },
);

StepBar.displayName = "StepBar";

```

```tsx
"use client";

import React, { useRef, useEffect } from "react";
import { ChevronDown, Check } from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import type { VoiceType } from "@/components/atoms/PartChip";

/** Voice-keyed semantic styles — fixed, cross-theme (MASTER.md §1) */
const VOICE_STYLES: Record<
  VoiceType,
  { letter: string; textColor: string; badgeBg: string; borderColor: string }
> = {
  soprano: {
    letter: "S",
    textColor: "#D32F2F",
    badgeBg: "#D32F2F33",
    borderColor: "#D32F2FB3",
  },
  alto: {
    letter: "A",
    textColor: "#1976D2",
    badgeBg: "#1976D233",
    borderColor: "#1976D2B3",
  },
  tenor: {
    letter: "T",
    textColor: "#FFB300",
    badgeBg: "#FFB3001A",
    borderColor: "#FFB300B3",
  },
  bass: {
    letter: "B",
    textColor: "#7B1FA2",
    badgeBg: "#7B1FA21A",
    borderColor: "#7B1FA2B3",
  },
};

const VOICE_LABELS: Record<VoiceType, string> = {
  soprano: "Soprano",
  alto: "Alto",
  tenor: "Tenor",
  bass: "Bass",
};

export interface VoiceDropdownProps {
  voice: VoiceType;
  instruments: string[];
  selected: string[];
  onToggle: (instrument: string) => void;
  className?: string;
}

/**
 * VoiceDropdown Molecule
 * Extracted from Pencil Node IDs: 0RQms / jPYyt / fGaR1 / i9BiM (Voice List rows in iVLue)
 * Collapsible row per SATB voice with a checkmark-list overlay for instrument selection.
 * Left border accent is voice-color keyed. Dropdown uses aria-expanded + role=listbox.
 */
export const VoiceDropdown = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  VoiceDropdownProps
>(({ voice, instruments, selected, onToggle, className }, ref) => {
  const [open, setOpen] = React.useState(false);
  const dropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const rowRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const styles = VOICE_STYLES[voice];
  const label = VOICE_LABELS[voice];

  // Close dropdown on outside click
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (
        dropdownRef.current &&
        !dropdownRef.current.contains(e.target as Node) &&
        rowRef.current &&
        !rowRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)
      ) {
        setOpen(false);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleOutside);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleOutside);
  }, []);

  // Keyboard navigation inside dropdown
  const handleDropdownKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
    const items = dropdownRef.current?.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(
      '[role="option"]',
    );
    if (!items || items.length === 0) return;
    const focused = document.activeElement as HTMLElement;
    const idx = Array.from(items).indexOf(focused);

    if (e.key === "ArrowDown") {
      e.preventDefault();
      items[Math.min(idx + 1, items.length - 1)]?.focus();
    } else if (e.key === "ArrowUp") {
      e.preventDefault();
      items[Math.max(idx - 1, 0)]?.focus();
    } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
      setOpen(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div ref={ref} className={cn("relative", className)}>
      {/* Trigger row */}
      <div
        ref={rowRef}
        role="button"
        tabIndex={0}
        aria-expanded={open}
        aria-haspopup="listbox"
        aria-controls={`voice-dropdown-${voice}`}
        onClick={() => setOpen((v) => !v)}
        onKeyDown={(e) => {
          if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") {
            e.preventDefault();
            setOpen((v) => !v);
          }
        }}
        className={cn(
          "flex items-center gap-[14px] h-[52px] w-full rounded-[6px] px-[16px]",
          "cursor-pointer select-none",
          "transition-opacity duration-150 hover:opacity-90",
          "focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-[var(--hf-accent)]",
        )}
        style={{
          backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 10%, transparent)",
          borderLeft: `3px solid ${styles.borderColor}`,
          borderTop: "1px solid transparent",
          borderRight: "1px solid transparent",
          borderBottom: "1px solid transparent",
        }}
      >
        {/* Voice badge + name */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-[8px] flex-1 min-w-0">
          <div
            className="flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-[12px] shrink-0"
            style={{ backgroundColor: styles.badgeBg }}
            aria-hidden="true"
          >
            <span
              className="font-mono text-[10px] font-bold leading-none"
              style={{ color: styles.textColor }}
            >
              {styles.letter}
            </span>
          </div>
          <span
            className="font-mono text-[13px] font-medium leading-none truncate"
            style={{ color: "var(--text-on-light)" }}
          >
            {label}
          </span>
        </div>

        {/* Count badge */}
        <div
          className="flex items-center rounded-full px-[8px] py-[3px] shrink-0"
          style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-accent)" }}
        >
          <span
            className="font-mono text-[10px] font-normal leading-none"
            style={{ color: "#1a0f0c" }}
          >
            {selected.length} selected
          </span>
        </div>

        {/* Chevron */}
        <ChevronDown
          className={cn(
            "w-5 h-5 shrink-0 transition-transform duration-200",
            open && "rotate-180",
          )}
          style={{ color: "var(--text-on-light)" }}
          aria-hidden="true"
        />
      </div>

      {/* Dropdown overlay */}
      {open && (
        <div
          id={`voice-dropdown-${voice}`}
          ref={dropdownRef}
          role="listbox"
          aria-label={`${label} instruments`}
          aria-multiselectable="true"
          onKeyDown={handleDropdownKeyDown}
          className={cn(
            "absolute left-0 right-0 z-[var(--z-tooltip)] mt-1",
            "rounded-[6px] border border-[var(--hf-detail)]",
            "shadow-md overflow-hidden",
          )}
          style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)" }}
        >
          {instruments.map((instrument) => {
            const isSelected = selected.includes(instrument);
            return (
              <div
                key={instrument}
                role="option"
                tabIndex={0}
                aria-selected={isSelected}
                onClick={() => onToggle(instrument)}
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                  if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    onToggle(instrument);
                  }
                }}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center gap-[10px] px-[16px] py-[10px]",
                  "cursor-pointer",
                  "transition-colors duration-100",
                  "hover:bg-[var(--hf-surface)]/5",
                  "focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:bg-[var(--hf-surface)]/10",
                )}
              >
                {/* Checkmark — visible when selected */}
                <Check
                  className={cn(
                    "w-[14px] h-[14px] shrink-0 transition-opacity duration-150",
                    isSelected ? "opacity-100" : "opacity-0",
                  )}
                  style={{ color: styles.textColor }}
                  aria-hidden="true"
                  strokeWidth={2.5}
                />
                <span
                  className="font-mono text-[11px] font-normal leading-none"
                  style={{ color: "var(--text-on-light)" }}
                >
                  {instrument}
                </span>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
});

VoiceDropdown.displayName = "VoiceDropdown";

```

import React from "react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { PartChip, type VoiceType } from "@/components/atoms/PartChip";

export interface SelectedPart {
  label: string;
  voice: VoiceType;
}

export interface EnsemblePreviewCardProps
  extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  selectedParts: SelectedPart[];
  totalParts?: number;
  onRemovePart?: (label: string) => void;
}

/**
 * EnsemblePreviewCard Molecule
 * Extracted from Pencil Node ID: LtBtZ ("Ensemble Preview Card")
 * Summary card showing selected voice/instrument chips below the voice dropdowns.
 */
export const EnsemblePreviewCard = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  EnsemblePreviewCardProps
>(({ selectedParts, totalParts = 12, onRemovePart, className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      className={cn(
        "flex flex-col gap-[16px] w-full rounded-[6px] p-[20px]",
        "border border-[var(--hf-detail)]",
        className,
      )}
      {...props}
    >
      {/* Header row — Node 7bP8H */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
        <span
          className="font-mono text-[12px] font-bold leading-none"
          style={{ color: "var(--text-on-light)" }}
        >
          Ensemble Preview
        </span>
        <span
          className="font-mono text-[11px] font-normal leading-none"
          style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-sub)" }}
        >
          {selectedParts.length} / {totalParts} parts
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Chip row — Node 9c48S */}
      <div
        className="flex flex-wrap gap-[8px]"
        role="list"
        aria-label="Selected ensemble parts"
      >
        {selectedParts.length === 0 ? (
          <span
            className="font-mono text-[11px] font-normal leading-none"
            style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-sub)" }}
          >
            No parts selected
          </span>
        ) : (
          selectedParts.map((part) => (
            <div key={`${part.voice}-${part.label}`} role="listitem">
              <PartChip
                label={part.label}
                voice={part.voice}
                onRemove={
                  onRemovePart ? () => onRemovePart(part.label) : undefined
                }
              />
            </div>
          ))
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
});

EnsemblePreviewCard.displayName = "EnsemblePreviewCard";

import React from "react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { LogoLockup } from "@/components/atoms/LogoLockup";
import { StepBar } from "@/components/molecules/StepBar";
import { ThemeToggle } from "@/components/atoms/ThemeToggle";

export interface DocumentHeaderProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement> {
  currentStep?: 1 | 2 | 3;
}

/**
 * DocumentHeader Organism
 * Extracted from Pencil Node ID: tHpLP ("Header")
 * 64px top bar: Logo (left) · StepBar (center) · ThemeToggle (right).
 * Bottom border uses --hf-detail (light) / --nocturne-surface-40 (dark).
 */
export const DocumentHeader = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLElement,
  DocumentHeaderProps
>(({ currentStep = 2, className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <header
      ref={ref}
      className={cn(
        "flex items-center justify-between w-full h-[64px] shrink-0",
        "px-[40px]",
        className,
      )}
      style={{
        backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)",
        borderBottom: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
      }}
      {...props}
    >
      {/* Left: Logo */}
      <LogoLockup />

      {/* Center: Progress steps */}
      <StepBar currentStep={currentStep} aria-label="Arrangement progress" />

      {/* Right: Theme toggle */}
      <ThemeToggle />
    </header>
  );
});

DocumentHeader.displayName = "DocumentHeader";

          >
            {/* TagSATB */}

              role="listitem"
              className="font-mono text-[10px] font-normal leading-none rounded-full px-[10px] py-[4px] border"
              style={{
                color: "var(--text-on-light)",
                backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 10%, transparent)",
                borderColor: "var(--hf-detail)",
              }}
            >
              SATB
            </span>

            {/* Tag44 */}

              role="listitem"
              className="font-mono text-[10px] font-normal leading-none rounded-full px-[10px] py-[4px] border"
              style={{

            >

            {/* TagTrad — filled amber */}

          aria-label="Score preview canvas"

ScorePreviewPanel.displayName = "ScorePreviewPanel";

/**
 * StaffLinePlaceholder
 * Renders three systems of 5-line staves at the positions defined in the design
 * (nodes sl1–sl15, bar lines, clef icons). Pure presentational — replaced by
 * VexFlow in a later phase.
 */
function StaffLinePlaceholder() {
  const staffColor = "var(--hf-staff-line)";

  // Three staff systems, 5 lines each, at y = 120/130/140/150/160, 220/…, 320/…
  const systemOffsets = [120, 220, 320];

  return (
    <svg
      className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full"
      preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"
      aria-hidden="true"
    >
      {systemOffsets.map((baseY) =>
        [0, 10, 20, 30, 40].map((dy, i) => (
          <line
            key={`${baseY}-${i}`}
            x1="0"
            y1={baseY + dy}
            x2="800"
            y2={baseY + dy}
            stroke={staffColor}
            strokeWidth={1}
          />
        )),
      )}

      {/* Barlines at design positions */}
      {systemOffsets.map((baseY) =>
        [60, 170, 280, 390, 500, 610, 720].map((x) => (
          <line
            key={`bar-${baseY}-${x}`}
            x1={x}
            y1={baseY}
            x2={x}
            y2={baseY + 40}
            stroke={staffColor}
            strokeWidth={1}
          />
        )),
      )}

      {/* Canvas label */}
      <text
        x="80"
        y="108"
        fill={staffColor}
        fontFamily="IBM Plex Mono, monospace"
        fontSize="11"
        fontWeight="normal"
        opacity="0.6"
      >
        VexFlow score renders here
      </text>
    </svg>
  );
}

"use client";

import React, { useState } from "react";
import { Sparkles } from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { VoiceDropdown } from "@/components/molecules/VoiceDropdown";
import { EnsemblePreviewCard, type SelectedPart } from "@/components/molecules/EnsemblePreviewCard";
import type { VoiceType } from "@/components/atoms/PartChip";

/** Placeholder instrument lists per voice — replaced by backend data later */
const VOICE_INSTRUMENTS: Record<VoiceType, string[]> = {
  soprano: ["Soprano Voice", "Flute", "Oboe", "Violin I"],
  alto: ["Alto Voice", "Clarinet", "Viola", "French Horn"],
  tenor: ["Tenor Voice", "Trumpet", "Cello", "Trombone"],
  bass: ["Bass Voice", "Bassoon", "Double Bass", "Tuba"],
};

const VOICE_ORDER: VoiceType[] = ["soprano", "alto", "tenor", "bass"];

export interface EnsembleBuilderPanelProps
  extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  onGenerateHarmonies?: () => void;
}

/**
 * EnsembleBuilderPanel Organism
 * Extracted from Pencil Node ID: ZlAUA ("Ensemble Builder Panel")
 * Right column: heading → 4 VoiceDropdowns → divider → EnsemblePreviewCard → Generate CTA.
 * Manages local selection state for each voice. Client component.
 */
export const EnsembleBuilderPanel = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  EnsembleBuilderPanelProps
>(({ onGenerateHarmonies, className, ...props }, ref) => {
  // Local selection state: voice → Set of selected instrument labels
  const [selections, setSelections] = useState<Record<VoiceType, string[]>>({
    soprano: ["Soprano Voice", "Flute"],
    alto: ["Alto Voice", "Clarinet"],
    tenor: ["Tenor Voice", "Trumpet", "Cello"],
    bass: ["Bass Voice", "Bassoon", "Double Bass"],
  });

  const handleToggle = (voice: VoiceType, instrument: string) => {
    setSelections((prev) => {
      const current = prev[voice];
      return {
        ...prev,
        [voice]: current.includes(instrument)
          ? current.filter((i) => i !== instrument)
          : [...current, instrument],
      };
    });
  };

  const handleRemovePart = (label: string) => {
    setSelections((prev) => {
      const next = { ...prev };
      for (const voice of VOICE_ORDER) {
        next[voice] = next[voice].filter((i) => i !== label);
      }
      return next;
    });
  };

  // Flatten all selected parts into SelectedPart[] for preview card
  const selectedParts: SelectedPart[] = VOICE_ORDER.flatMap((voice) =>
    selections[voice].map((label) => ({ label, voice })),
  );

  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      className={cn(
        "flex flex-col gap-[24px] flex-1 h-full overflow-y-auto",
        "px-[48px] pt-[32px] pb-[32px]",
        className,
      )}
      style={{
        backgroundColor: "var(--neutral-50)",
        borderLeft: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
      }}
      {...props}
    >
      {/* Heading — Node eOoBk */}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-[6px]">
        <h2
          className="font-brand text-[26px] font-normal leading-none"
          style={{ color: "var(--text-on-light)" }}
        >
          Ensemble Builder
        </h2>
        <p
          className="font-mono text-[12px] font-normal leading-none"
          style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-sub)" }}
        >
          Select instruments for your arrangement
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Voice List — Node iVLue */}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-[10px] w-full">
        {VOICE_ORDER.map((voice) => (
          <VoiceDropdown
            key={voice}
            voice={voice}
            instruments={VOICE_INSTRUMENTS[voice]}
            selected={selections[voice]}
            onToggle={(instrument) => handleToggle(voice, instrument)}
          />
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Divider — Node IPbv5 */}
      <div
        className="w-full h-[1px] shrink-0"
        style={{
          backgroundColor: "var(--hf-detail)",
          opacity: 0.4,
        }}
        aria-hidden="true"
      />

      {/* Ensemble Preview Card — Node LtBtZ */}
      <EnsemblePreviewCard
        selectedParts={selectedParts}
        totalParts={12}
        onRemovePart={handleRemovePart}
      />

      {/* Generate CTA row — Node nrVwz / rJKG6 */}
      <div className="flex justify-end w-full">
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={onGenerateHarmonies}
          className={cn(
            "flex items-center gap-[8px] rounded-[6px] px-[24px] py-[12px]",
            "font-mono text-[13px] font-bold leading-none",
            "transition-opacity duration-150 hover:opacity-90 active:opacity-80",
            "focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-[var(--hf-surface)]",
          )}
          style={{
            backgroundColor: "var(--hf-accent)",
            color: "var(--text-on-light)",
          }}
          aria-label="Generate harmonies"
        >
          <Sparkles
            className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0"
            aria-hidden="true"
          />
          Generate Harmonies
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
});

EnsembleBuilderPanel.displayName = "EnsembleBuilderPanel";

```

    28→

    49→    // Dark:  ktaiB_grad -> #2d1817 to #3e2723; base #492c26; stem #3e2723

Actually the issue is that the SVG has `pointer-events-none` class on the whole SVG element. The foreignObject inner div has `pointer-events-auto`. So clicking on the SVG itself won't work for click events, but the foreignObject div can be clicked.

The cleanest fix:
- Add `cursor-pointer` to the foreignObject div
- Add a hidden `<input type="file">` below the SVG in the DOM
- On `onClick` of the outer div (or the foreignObject div), trigger `inputRef.current?.click()`
- On input `onChange`, call `onFileDrop`

Now I'll set this up in `DropzoneCopy.tsx` by adding the ref and hidden input, wiring the click handler to trigger the file picker, and connecting the input change event to `onFileDrop`. Then in the sandbox page, I'll add the client directive, import the router, create a handler that navigates to the document page, and pass it down to the component.

```tsx
"use client";

import { usePathname, useRouter } from "next/navigation";

const SCREENS = [
  { n: 1, label: "Home",     path: "/"          },
  { n: 2, label: "Sandbox",  path: "/sandbox"   },
  { n: 3, label: "Document", path: "/document"  },
  { n: 4, label: "—",        path: "#"          },
] as const;

/**
 * DevNav — temporary dev-only screen switcher.
 * Fixed bottom-left. Only rendered when NODE_ENV === "development".
 */
export function DevNav() {
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const router = useRouter();

  if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "development") return null;

  return (
    <nav
      className="fixed bottom-4 left-4 z-[9999] flex items-center gap-1"
      aria-label="Dev screen switcher"
    >
      {SCREENS.map(({ n, label, path }) => {
        const active = pathname === path;
        return (
          <button
            key={n}
            onClick={() => path !== "#" && router.push(path)}
            title={label}
            disabled={path === "#"}
            className="w-7 h-7 rounded text-[11px] font-mono font-bold leading-none transition-colors duration-100 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            style={{
              backgroundColor: active ? "#FFB300" : "rgba(45,24,23,0.75)",
              color: active ? "#1a0f0c" : "#f8f8f8",
              border: "1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.3)",
            }}
          >
            {n}
          </button>
        );
      })}
    </nav>
  );
}

```

    11→  { letter: string; textColor: string; badgeBg: string; borderColor: string }

    34→    badgeBg: "#7B1FA21A",

    45→
    46→export interface VoiceDropdownProps {
    47→  voice: VoiceType;
    48→  instruments: string[];
    49→  selected: string[];
    50→  onToggle: (instrument: string) => void;
    51→  className?: string;

    53→
    54→/**
    55→ * VoiceDropdown Molecule
    56→ * Extracted from Pencil Node IDs: 0RQms / jPYyt / fGaR1 / i9BiM (Voice List rows in iVLue)
    57→ * Collapsible row per SATB voice with a checkmark-list overlay for instrument selection.
    58→ * Left border accent is voice-color keyed. Dropdown uses aria-expanded + role=listbox.
    59→ */
    60→export const VoiceDropdown = React.forwardRef<
    61→  HTMLDivElement,
    62→  VoiceDropdownProps
    63→>(({ voice, instruments, selected, onToggle, className }, ref) => {
    64→  const [open, setOpen] = React.useState(false);
    65→  const dropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    66→  const rowRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    67→  const styles = VOICE_STYLES[voice];
    68→  const label = VOICE_LABELS[voice];
    69→
    70→  // Close dropdown on outside click
    71→  useEffect(() => {
    72→    const handleOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
    73→      if (
    74→        dropdownRef.current &&
    75→        !dropdownRef.current.contains(e.target as Node) &&
    76→        rowRef.current &&
    77→        !rowRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)
    78→      ) {
    79→        setOpen(false);
    80→      }
    81→    };
    82→    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleOutside);
    83→    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleOutside);
    84→  }, []);
    85→
    86→  // Keyboard navigation inside dropdown
    87→  const handleDropdownKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
    88→    const items = dropdownRef.current?.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(
    89→      '[role="option"]',
    90→    );
    91→    if (!items || items.length === 0) return;
    92→    const focused = document.activeElement as HTMLElement;
    93→    const idx = Array.from(items).indexOf(focused);
    94→
    95→    if (e.key === "ArrowDown") {
    96→      e.preventDefault();
    97→      items[Math.min(idx + 1, items.length - 1)]?.focus();
    98→    } else if (e.key === "ArrowUp") {
    99→      e.preventDefault();
   100→      items[Math.max(idx - 1, 0)]?.focus();
   101→    } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
   102→      setOpen(false);
   103→    }
   104→  };
   105→
   106→  return (
   107→    <div ref={ref} className={cn("relative", className)}>
   108→      {/* Trigger row */}
   109→      <div
   110→        ref={rowRef}
   111→        role="button"
   112→        tabIndex={0}
   113→        aria-expanded={open}
   114→        aria-haspopup="listbox"
   115→        aria-controls={`voice-dropdown-${voice}`}
   116→        onClick={() => setOpen((v) => !v)}
   117→        onKeyDown={(e) => {
   118→          if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") {

   120→            setOpen((v) => !v);
   121→          }
   122→        }}
   123→        className={cn(

   126→          "transition-opacity duration-150 hover:opacity-90",
   127→          "focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-[var(--hf-accent)]",
   128→        )}

   130→          backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 10%, transparent)",
   131→          borderLeft: `3px solid ${styles.borderColor}`,
   132→          borderTop: "1px solid transparent",
   133→          borderRight: "1px solid transparent",
   134→          borderBottom: "1px solid transparent",
   135→        }}
   136→      >
   137→        {/* Voice badge + name */}
   138→        <div className="flex items-center gap-[8px] flex-1 min-w-0">
   139→          <div
   140→            className="flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-[12px] shrink-0"
   141→            style={{ backgroundColor: styles.badgeBg }}
   142→            aria-hidden="true"
   143→          >
   144→            <span
   145→              className="font-mono text-[10px] font-bold leading-none"
   146→              style={{ color: styles.textColor }}
   147→            >
   148→              {styles.letter}
   149→            </span>
   150→          </div>
   151→          <span
   152→            className="font-mono text-[13px] font-medium leading-none truncate"
   153→            style={{ color: "var(--text-on-light)" }}
   154→          >
   155→            {label}
   156→          </span>
