```text
   189→          aria-label={`${label} instruments`}
   190→          aria-multiselectable="true"
   191→          onKeyDown={handleDropdownKeyDown}
   192→          className={cn(
   193→            "absolute left-0 right-0 z-[var(--z-tooltip)] mt-1",
   194→            "rounded-[6px] border border-[var(--hf-detail)]",
   195→            "shadow-md overflow-hidden",
   196→          )}
   197→          style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)" }}
   198→        >
   199→          {instruments.map((instrument) => {
   200→            const isSelected = selected.includes(instrument);
   201→            return (
   202→              <div
   203→                key={instrument}
   204→                role="option"
   205→                tabIndex={0}
   206→                aria-selected={isSelected}
   207→                onClick={() => onToggle(instrument)}
   208→                onKeyDown={(e) => {
   209→                  if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") {
   210→                    e.preventDefault();
   211→                    onToggle(instrument);
   212→                  }
   213→                }}
   214→                className={cn(
   215→                  "flex items-center gap-[10px] px-[16px] py-[10px]",
   216→                  "cursor-pointer",
   217→                  "transition-colors duration-100",
   218→                  "hover:bg-[var(--hf-surface)]/5",
   219→                  "focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:bg-[var(--hf-surface)]/10",
   220→                )}
   221→              >
   222→                {/* Checkmark — visible when selected */}
   223→                <Check
   224→                  className={cn(
   225→                    "w-[14px] h-[14px] shrink-0 transition-opacity duration-150",
   226→                    isSelected ? "opacity-100" : "opacity-0",
   227→                  )}
   228→                  style={{ color: styles.textColor }}
   229→                  aria-hidden="true"
   230→                  strokeWidth={2.5}
   231→                />
   232→                <span
   233→                  className="font-mono text-[11px] font-normal leading-none"
   234→                  style={{ color: "var(--text-on-light)" }}
   235→                >
   236→                  {instrument}
   237→                </span>
   238→              </div>
   239→            );
   240→          })}
   241→        </div>
   242→      )}
   243→    </div>
   244→  );
   245→});
   246→
   247→VoiceDropdown.displayName = "VoiceDropdown";
   248→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import React from "react";
     2→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     3→
     4→export type VoiceType = "soprano" | "alto" | "tenor" | "bass";
     5→
     6→/** Semantic colors per voice — fixed, cross-theme (MASTER.md §1) */
     7→const VOICE_COLORS: Record<VoiceType, { text: string; bg: string }> = {
     8→  soprano: { text: "#D32F2F", bg: "#D32F2F1A" },
     9→  alto:    { text: "#1976D2", bg: "#1976D21A" },
    10→  tenor:   { text: "#FFB300", bg: "#FFB3001A" },
    11→  bass:    { text: "#7B1FA2", bg: "#7B1FA21A" },
    12→};
    13→
    14→export interface PartChipProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement> {
    15→  label: string;
    16→  voice: VoiceType;
    17→  onRemove?: () => void;
    18→}
    19→
    20→/**
    21→ * PartChip Atom
    22→ * Extracted from Pencil Node ID: 9c48S ("ChipRow") children
    23→ * Dismissible voice/instrument chip — color keyed by voice semantic token.
    24→ */
    25→export const PartChip = React.forwardRef<HTMLSpanElement, PartChipProps>(
    26→  ({ label, voice, onRemove, className, ...props }, ref) => {
    27→    const { text, bg } = VOICE_COLORS[voice];
    28→
    29→    return (
    30→      <span
    31→        ref={ref}
    32→        className={cn(
    33→          "inline-flex items-center rounded-full font-mono text-[10px] font-normal leading-none",
    34→          "px-[10px] py-[4px]",
    35→          className,
    36→        )}
    37→        style={{ color: text, backgroundColor: bg }}
    38→        {...props}
    39→      >
    40→        {label}
    41→        {onRemove && (
    42→          <button
    43→            type="button"
    44→            onClick={onRemove}
    45→            className="ml-1 leading-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-current rounded-full"
    46→            aria-label={`Remove ${label}`}
    47→          >
    48→            ×
    49→          </button>
    50→        )}
    51→      </span>
    52→    );
    53→  },
    54→);
    55→
    56→PartChip.displayName = "PartChip";
    57→
```

Key issues I see:

1. **EnsembleBuilderPanel**: `backgroundColor: "var(--neutral-50)"` in inline style — this will always resolve to the light value `#F5F0EF`. It can't switch to `var(--nocturne-detail)` in dark mode since inline styles don't respond to Tailwind's `.dark` class. Need to use `useTheme` + mounted pattern OR define a new CSS var that maps correctly in dark mode.


2. **VoiceDropdown** and **EnsemblePreviewCard** both hardcode `var(--text-on-light)` for text color, but these named tokens don't automatically switch between light and dark contexts — they need to be replaced with contextual variables that respond to the `.dark` class, or I need to check if these tokens already have that built-in switching behavior.

I should look at globals.css to see what's actually defined, and then check the dark mode frame (Node ID: lXHYH) from the design file to understand the exact color values I need to use.
